prompt: A dark screen filled with endless scrolling AI chat messages rendered in glowing green terminal text on black background. The text is intentionally blurred and overwhelming, creating a sense of information overload. Mysterious fog and soft amber light seep from the edges of the frame. Square composition, cinematic lighting, mysterious dark-tech aesthetic, moody atmosphere.
negative_prompt: bright colors, happy, cartoon, watermark, text overlay, UI chrome

prompt: Close-up of a developer's hands typing on a mechanical keyboard, reflected in a dark glossy monitor. Through the window behind, the lights of Brighton Pier blur into golden bokeh against a night sky. The monitor shows faint code. Cinematic, intimate, moody noir photography style. Square composition, shallow depth of field, mysterious atmosphere.
negative_prompt: daytime, bright, cartoon, full body shot, watermark

prompt: An abstract tangled ball of glowing luminescent threads suspended in pure darkness. Each thread is a different color — some vibrant cyan and amber, others dim and fading gray. The threads are chaotic, intertwined, representing messy chat transcripts becoming entropy. Dark background, dramatic lighting from within the tangle. Square composition, mysterious, abstract digital art.
negative_prompt: text, watermark, human figures, bright background, cartoon

prompt: The same tangled thread ball now compressing and transforming. The dim gray threads dissolve into particles. Only six bright threads remain, forming a clean hexagonal geometric shape. The light intensifies at the center, amber and cyan glow. Particles scatter outward from the compression. Dark background, transformative moment captured. Square composition, luminous, mysterious.
negative_prompt: text, watermark, bright background, messy, cartoon

prompt: A floating crystalline hexagonal artifact with six perfectly defined facets, each subtly labeled with glowing text: intent, task, constraints, acceptance, context, priority. The crystal glows warm amber against a deep blue-black void. Light refracts through the crystal creating caustic patterns. Elegant, geometric, precious gem aesthetic. Square composition, mysterious, cinematic lighting.
negative_prompt: messy, cluttered, bright background, cartoon, watermark

Middle platform has a glowing pattern-matching grid labeled 'Template'. Top platform has a brain-like neural icon labeled 'Model'. Architectural, spatial, clean tech diagram aesthetic.
